epigraph.quote: Simon has brought gin & Tonic on this trip. It makes it even nicer.

moments.quote: We stopped to admire the Humber Bridge + walked down to the water's edge through a nature park near an old black windmill.
Pradhma, Godfrey, Emy & Evans welcomed us warmly + picked apples from the tree in their garden + gave us a good supper.

moments.place: Muston Grange Caravan Park, Filey, UK
moments.quote: extraordinarily regimented & densely packed caravans. £12.50. Nice people.
Simon decided to take a "short cut" but we couldn't get out of the barbed wire/ditches surrounding the field & ended up walking 4 sides of it.
having a tour of the Poison Garden & looking at the Grand Cascade

images.caption: treehouse walkway develops into swinging bridges

moments.quote: We walked along the beach at high tide & I collected shells. It's very beautiful & looks across to Holy Island.
The farmer's very nice, He's given us the vet's number for tomorrow, some of his calves' dioralyte for this evening.
It would make a good cycling holiday to rent a cottage here & cycle around with young children.
we crossed between Weardale & Teesdale, through Stanhope B6278, glorious empty moorland.
Lovely wild flowers in meadows by the river & little bridges.
